description: Abyssal Depths Patch 4 (26 August 2025) — Crystal Offhands, Mists Changes, Knightfall Abbey changes, Forced Dismount Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes (see separate thread), Fixes.

sections.heading: Crystal Offhands
sections.description: Three Crystal Offhands added: Unbreakable Ward (Shield), Blueflame Torch (Torch), Timelocked Grimoire (Tome). Artifacts to craft them will be available from Conqueror's Chests once the current Guild Season ends.
sections.searchable_text: Crystal Offhands Unbreakable Ward Shield Blueflame Torch Timelocked Grimoire Tome Conqueror's Chests Guild Season

sections.heading: Mists Changes
items: Adjusted Mists instance management to focus more players into each instance
Unenchanted Lethal Mists are now less likely to have an entrance to Brecilien, but more likely to have Unstable Roads exits
sections.searchable_text: Mists instance management Unenchanted Lethal Mists Brecilien Unstable Roads exits

sections.heading: Knightfall Abbey
items: Chests in Knightfall Abbey now grant the first opener's party one stack of Knightly Grace
Blessing of Valor now adds immunity to Forced Movement
sections.searchable_text: Knightfall Abbey Chests Knightly Grace Blessing of Valor Forced Movement immunity

sections.heading: Forced Dismount Changes
items: Forced Dismount (dismounted by damage): No longer grants cleanse and crowd control immunity when Disarray is active
Forced Dismount in the Mists (dismounted by damage): 50% damage and CC strength reduction applied for 10s when dismounted by a hostile player in combat with another player
sections.searchable_text: Forced Dismount Disarray cleanse CC immunity Mists 50% damage CC strength reduction 10s hostile player combat

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Season winner mount skins now delivered once to each qualifying account, rather than to each qualifying character
Trading in Hellgates is no longer possible
Several Albion Journal missions have had their rewards adjusted
The maximum Buy Order amount has been decreased to 9990
Mobs in Corrupted Dungeons now drop Silver again
[Controller] Controller Cursor in UIs is now disabled by default
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Season winner mount skins account character Hellgates trading Journal rewards Buy Order 9990 Corrupted Dungeons Silver Controller Cursor disabled default

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch are published separately (thread 215606).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where Anniversary Barbarian vanity skin appeared smaller than intended
Fixed issue where characters would perform the wrong Journey Back animation when using certain mount skins
Demon Arrow (Wailing Bow): Fixed issue where the first target hit could receive more damage than subsequent ones
Soulspindle Pounce (Soulspinner): Tooltip now contains info about speed buff after second cast
Fixed issue where ingame mails relating to Antiquarian's Den Marketplaces would not specify the Den's city
Fixed issue where Crystal Arena Rank rewards UI wrongly stated 'Claimed' before playing an arena match
Fixed issue where Hide HUD Mode would prevent casting spells after shapeshifting and Overcharge activation
Fixed issue where salvaging items for Gold would not count item stacks correctly
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Anniversary Barbarian vanity Journey Back animation Demon Arrow Wailing Bow damage Soulspindle Pounce Soulspinner speed buff tooltip Antiquarian's Den Marketplaces mails Crystal Arena Rank rewards Claimed Hide HUD Mode shapeshifting Overcharge salvaging Gold item stacks
